NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-21-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEP-25-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-21-2025 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. MATTER WAS CALLED AT AROUND 10:10AM, NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. WILLIAM REUSTLE, ESQ. APPEARING SPECIALLY FOR DEFENDANT. MR. REUSTLE HAS A COPY OF THE JOINT STIPULATION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL FOR 180 DAYS THAT WAS SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES IN DECEMBER. COURT STATES THAT THERE WAS NO EX PARTE APPLICATION ON FILE OR A NOTICED MOTION. COURT DISMISSES CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. ***AT AROUND 10:20AM, MATTER WAS RECALLED. HOOTAN ATEFYEKTA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. THIS CASE WAS CALLED WHEN PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WAS OUTSIDE WITH THE COURT'S DIRECTION TO SETTLE ON ANOTHER CASE. THE MATTER WAS CALLED EARLIER WHEN DEFENSE COUNSEL WAS HERE, AND CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF WAS NOT HERE. THERE IS A JOINT STIPULATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL FOR 180 DAYS AND NORMALLY THE COURT USUALLY DO NOT CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE ON THE DAY OF TRIAL UNLESS THERE'S GOOD CAUSE AND ON THIS CASE, THERE IS NO GOOD CAUSE. DUE TO THE COURT'S ERROR, THE STIPULATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL WILL BE HONORED AND TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO 6/23/25. COUNSELS ARE ORDERED TO BE PRESENT AND PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. THEN A FEW MINUTES LATER, CLERK WAS ABLE TO CONTACT WILLIAM REUSTLE, COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT, WHO IS NOW APPEARING BY PHONE. THE COURT CONFIRMS WITH MR. REUSTLE THAT A JOINT STIPULATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL WAS SIGNED. THE COURT SETS ASIDE THE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE EARLIER SINCE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS OUTSIDE THE COURTROOM TRYING TO SETTLE ANOTHER CASE. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO 6/23/25 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
